name: Motichoor Laddu
description: Exquisite pearls of gram flour deep-fried in pure ghee and soaked in aromatic sugar syrup. Each bite melts in your mouth with the richness of tradition.

name: Kaju Katli
description: The quintessential Indian treat made from premium cashews and minimal sugar, topped with a delicate silver leaf. A symbol of celebration and luxury.

name: Gulab Jamun
description: Soft, succulent milk-solid spheres deep-fried to golden perfection and resting in a heavy cardamom-infused syrup. Best served warm for a heavenly experience.

name: White Rasgulla
description: Bengali style soft, spongy balls of chhena cooked in light sugar syrup. Light, refreshing, and perfectly balanced sweetness.

name: Special Jalebi
description: Crispy, circular spirals made of fermented batter, deep-fried and dipped in sugar syrup. A crunchy delight loved by all ages.

name: Mysore Pak
description: A legendary South Indian sweet made from roasted gram flour, generous amounts of pure desi ghee, and sugar. Rich, porous, and aromatic.
